command_log.command: WHEEL_LIB_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.390/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && WORKFLOW_FILE="workflows/branch-multi.json" && WORKFLOW=$(workflow_load "$WORKFLOW_FILE") && workflow_validate_unique_ids "$WORKFLOW" && state_init ".wheel/state.json" "$WORKFLOW" "$WORKFLOW_FILE" && echo "Workflow 'branch-multi' started ($(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq '.steps | length') steps)." && echo "First step: $(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].id') ($(echo "$WORKFLOW" | jq -r '.steps[0].type'))" && echo "" && echo "Hooks are now active. Run /wheel-status to check progress, /wheel-stop to deactivate."
if [ -f package.json ]; then echo 'javascript'; elif [ -f Cargo.toml ]; then echo 'rust'; elif [ -f go.mod ]; then echo 'go'; else echo 'unknown'; fi

steps.output:

No detailed analyzer for this language yet.
